backend/main.mo: Defines an empty backend actor with no logic or data storage.
feature_evidence.json: Contains feature evidence records mapping requested features to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists short human-written summaries of key frontend source files for reference.
frontend/index.css: Defines global theming variables and base styles using Tailwind for a finance‑themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React app and sets basic metadata and favicon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Composes AppLayout and ContentPage to render the full application UI.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout with header navigation, site branding, footer disclaimer, and wrapper for page content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context, login handling, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder hooks for future backend queries, currently returning actor state only.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind-based design system with light/dark finance-oriented color tokens and typography rules.
frontend/src/internal/sensitive-audit-no: Documents internal audit steps confirming no sensitive data exists and outlines sanitization measures.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/ContentPage.tsx: Main landing page component with hero, disclaimer, features, pricing plan selection behavior, and scrolling logic to contact section.
frontend/src/utils/sanitizeSensitiveText: Utility functions to detect, redact, and validate text for sensitive financial information or the specific number 93260.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, shadows, typography, animations, and container settings for the frontend.
project_state.json: JSON metadata describing project state, requested features, and current website requirements for Trading Solutions.
